name: Baoyu Slide Deck
description_en: Turn content into a professional slide deck rendered as images—the skill first writes an outline with per-slide style instructions, then generates each slide as an individual image. Decks are tuned for reading and sharing (self-explanatory, logical scroll flow, social-media-friendly) rather than live presentation.
description_zh: 把内容做成以图片呈现的专业幻灯片——技能先写出带逐页风格说明的大纲,再逐页生成单张幻灯片图片。deck 面向阅读与分享优化(自解释、顺滑的滚动逻辑、适合社媒),而非现场演讲。
long_en: The slide-deck skill from Baoyu's (Jim Liu) skills collection—the curated entry installs just the baoyu-slide-deck folder, not the whole 21-skill bundle. It drives whatever user-input and image-generation tools the host agent exposes to lay out and render each slide.
long_zh: 宝玉(Jim Liu)技能合集中的幻灯片技能——本条目只安装 baoyu-slide-deck 这一个目录,而非整套 21 个技能。它调用宿主 agent 暴露的用户输入与图片生成工具来排版并渲染每一页。
sec_note_en: Requires bun or npx to run its scripts, and an image-generation backend to render slides—rendering sends slide content to that image tool/provider and may incur API cost.
sec_note_zh: 运行脚本需要 bun 或 npx,渲染幻灯片需要一个图片生成后端——渲染会把幻灯片内容发送给该图片工具/厂商,并可能产生 API 费用。
